role_in_text: Enabling quantum computing to become a managed network layer.
occurrence_sentence: Anyon enables telecom operators to become national quantum infrastructure providers by adding quantum computing as a managed layer within secure data centres and networks, first serving research and government users and later expanding to enterprise, financial services, energy, defence, industrial, and public-sector customers.

mentions.occurrence_sentence: At the core of this capability are qubits, which operate at extremely low temperatures and enable exponential computational scaling as systems grow, opening the path toward quantum advantage. Anyon builds on superconducting qubit technology, one of the most mature and commercially viable approaches.

Anyon provides deployable, upgradeable superconducting quantum systems that give industrial R&D teams early access to quantum hardware, hybrid workflows, and applied capability within trusted operating environments.

mentions.role_in_text: provides superconducting quantum systems and campus strategies
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Anyon provides superconducting quantum systems and campus strategies that help academic users move from theory to hands-on hardware engagement while building talent pipelines in device fabrication, cryogenic RF engineering, yield engineering, and process control.

mentions.role_in_text: provides domestic access to quantum hardware, secure deployment pathways, talent development programs, and reduced dependence on foreign supply chains
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Anyon helps nations build sovereign quantum capability by providing domestic access to quantum hardware, secure deployment pathways, talent development programs, and reduced dependence on foreign supply chains.
Anyon designs quantum systems for this future, enabling on-prem quantum machines to be deployed as part of the broader advanced-compute stack in HPC, AI, and sovereign infrastructure environments.

mentions.role_in_text: Provides secure quantum systems for defence and national security organizations.
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Anyon supports defence users with deployable superconducting quantum systems for controlled sovereign environments, with potential applications in simulation, optimization, cryptographic research, secure communications, and complex mission planning.

mentions.role_in_text: designs and deploys operational quantum systems
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Anyon designs and deploys operational quantum systems that integrate directly into existing HPC environments: a qubit superconducting system built for automated, no-liquid-cryogen, water-cooled operation within existing HPC fabric.

occurrence_sentence: The company has already demonstrated the ability to deliver operational quantum hardware into high-performance computing environments, including MonarQ, deployed in Calcul Québec's HPC ecosystem.

mentions.occurrence_sentence: At the core of our quantum computer is the quantum processor: an advanced superconducting chip designed to host qubits and execute quantum operations.
